objects.title: Doctrine: Collective Beta versioning
objects.summary: A **Collective Beta** is a coordinated cut across every runtime consumer of a composed payload — not a single-repo release and not a deploy by itself.

objects.title: Doctrine: Control Alt project/repo registry v1

objects.title: Imprint: Hail Glyph Hero — compliance execution failure (2026-06-19)
objects.product_area: Hail platform — Glyph Hero / agent execution
objects.summary: On **2026-06-19**, after the operator directed an agent to write **`imprint-hail-glyph-hero-compliance`** (golden path, operator §4, no upsert-as-proof), the **same agent session** treated a **new narrow structural verifier** as ship criteria, registered slot/icon glyphs, and…

objects.title: Imprint: Hail Glyph Hero — compliance (execution lock)
objects.product_area: Hail platform — Glyph Hero / agent execution
objects.summary: **Glyph Hero** essence is defined in **`doctrine-hail-glyph-essence`** (Praxis). This imprint does **not** redefine it. It locks **how agents and scripts may claim compliance** so pytest, upsert scripts, and “fixture shipped” cannot substitute for the product path.

objects.title: Imprint: Hail Glyph plot gate — semantics not enforced (2026-06-20)
objects.product_area: Hail platform — plot gate / verify scripts
objects.summary: **`verify:glyph-plot` / `glyph_plot_verify.py`** passes **`custom-combadge-plot`** while operator **P1 subject read fails**. The gate certifies **geometry heuristics and hero metrics**, not the product requirement in `doctrine-hail-glyph-essence` (“one subject in a phrase”).

objects.title: Imprint: Hail Glyph plot proof — validation conflated with representation (2026-06-20)
objects.product_area: Hail platform — plot proof / Glyph Plot / chain step 24
objects.summary: Campaign **`pso-20260620-axiom-glyph-plot-proof`** promised a **plot layer** (“draw before deliver”). Implementation shipped **validation infrastructure** (API, Glyph Plot UI, plot gate script, static fixture) that **reuses the same display substrate** as Forge and Hails.

objects.title: Imprint: Hail Glyph — representation layer gap (documented vs shipped)
objects.product_area: Hail platform — Glyph / Engine / Forge / TV delivery

objects.title: Imprint: Hail hero-centric effect field
objects.product_area: Hail platform — Grid layout / Effects Sidekick / TV playback
objects.summary: **Effects Sidekick** VFX scale to the **Glyph Hero** and the **Hail moment** — not to an arbitrary small box derived from glyph-focus height alone. VFX may **extend past drawn glyph art** (card ink, emblem paths) while remaining inside the **Grid safe zone**.

objects.title: Imprint: Hail loadout color — by-element scope
objects.product_area: Hail platform — compose / Forge / loadout studio / preview
objects.summary: Operators pick one **COLOR** loadout (`visual.palette_id`). On Hails compose and Hail Forge, that choice **over-applies** when it tints Grid scrim, message plate/text, or effect beams from the same control.

objects.title: Imprint: Hail package — sidekick transition boundary
objects.product_area: Hail platform — compose / package / delivery / TV playback
objects.summary: A **completed Hail Package** is a **frozen composed artifact** — geometry, hero content, and **resolved sidekick manifests** at Save. It must **not** embed transition choreography as operator-editable instructions.

objects.title: Imprint: Hail priority levels — Green / Yellow / Red
objects.product_area: Hail platform — operator intent & TV presentation
objects.summary: **Hail Priority** is the operator-facing **intent band** for a hail: how much attention it should command on the TV and in the household rhythm.

objects.title: Imprint: Hail work chain — deviation lock
objects.product_area: Hail platform — agent scope / execution discipline
objects.summary: Agents **must not** pick Hail platform work from stale campaigns, parallel tracks, or “high impact” heuristics when **`scheme-hail-platform-work-chain`** exists. Implement **only** the step marked **`active`**, unless the operator explicitly deviates using a phrase below.
